raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.3,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.5,"R1.4":0.7,"R1.5":0.0,"R1.6":0.3,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.2","R1.3","R1.4","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"rationale":{"R1.2":"The abstract advances a causal identification strategy (sequential ignorability → unbiased AIPW estimate); logical consistency of that chain — assumption plausibility, propensity-score role, estimand definition — is a natural focus of any substantive review.","R1.3":"Empirical results are stated (ATE +0.18, CI [0.14,0.22], correlation 0.31) without underlying data; checking whether the narrative claims are supported by or outrun those numbers is warranted.","R1.4":"The abstract is saturated with 'the first' assertions (≥6 instances); any serious look will need to evaluate whether prior work truly leaves these gaps open, making novelty assessment a plausible load-bearing concern."},"clarification_needed":true,"clarification_question":"Are you looking for writing and style feedback on this paragraph, or a critical evaluation of its technical and novelty claims?"}

rationale.R1.2: The abstract advances a causal identification strategy (sequential ignorability → unbiased AIPW estimate); logical consistency of that chain — assumption plausibility, propensity-score role, estimand definition — is a natural focus of any substantive review.
rationale.R1.3: Empirical results are stated (ATE +0.18, CI [0.14,0.22], correlation 0.31) without underlying data; checking whether the narrative claims are supported by or outrun those numbers is warranted.
rationale.R1.4: The abstract is saturated with 'the first' assertions (≥6 instances); any serious look will need to evaluate whether prior work truly leaves these gaps open, making novelty assessment a plausible load-bearing concern.
